texts.label: text
texts.orig: We respond to increasingly stringent emission regulations through our worldleading technology for purifying automobile exhaust gas, contributing to environmental protection and enriching our life.
texts.text: We respond to increasingly stringent emission regulations through our worldleading technology for purifying automobile exhaust gas, contributing to environmental protection and enriching our life.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Responding to Challenges with Leading-Edge Technologies
texts.text: Responding to Challenges with Leading-Edge Technologies

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the rapidly advancing field of electronics, we are exploring unique technologies to address the issues of an ever-evolving digital society.
texts.text: In the rapidly advancing field of electronics, we are exploring unique technologies to address the issues of an ever-evolving digital society.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Supporting Global Power Supply and Advances in the Industry
texts.text: Supporting Global Power Supply and Advances in the Industry

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We ensure stable electricity supply and explore new potentials for energy, transforming a wide range of industrial segments including the chemical and pharmaceutical industries.
texts.text: We ensure stable electricity supply and explore new potentials for energy, transforming a wide range of industrial segments including the chemical and pharmaceutical industries.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Net sales 3.5 billion EUR  as of Mar 2023

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NGK offers various membrane products for different purposes with optimal solutions ranging from dust collection systems to molecular separation.
texts.text: NGK offers various membrane products for different purposes with optimal solutions ranging from dust collection systems to molecular separation.
